basis: Existing PROD sub-account (Ghstz8eIsHWLeXek47dk) as the foundation: keep its proven mechanics and real asset ids, fix the opportunity data model, add the original Target's workflow set including the nurture designs. Cody builds are reference material only. Single GHL sub-account with per-location calendars (Lobbie 1:N confirmed; separate calendars per location are Lobbie's only topology requirement, and prod already has them).
principles: One parameterized workflow per responsibility. Location is a variable (opportunity.location + Locations custom object), never a workflow clone.
One Sales pipeline (Lead to Close). Retention & Renewals, Referrals, and Instagram DM stay separate by role, not by clinic.
If a fact describes the sale it lives on the Opportunity; if it describes the member it lives on the Contact.
First-party collection, server-side transmission. No third-party pixels on regulated pages; SAC owns every send to Meta and Google.
Every field has exactly one writer. Every conversion path is idempotent (event_id + outcome_processed_at).
Build in prod as drafts; cutover is publish/unpublish, not migration.

limitation_rules.rule: Opportunity merge fields and writes require a bound opportunity
limitation_rules.response: Opportunity writes only occur in workflows triggered by opportunity events or immediately after a create/update/find-opportunity step. No stamp runs on a bare contact trigger.

limitation_rules.rule: No trigger fires on a specific opportunity field change
limitation_rules.response: Workflows trigger on contact-level events (forms, tags, appointments). SAC is notified by explicit webhook steps inside WF-05/06/13, never by watching fields. renewal_date stays on the Contact for the native custom-date trigger.

limitation_rules.rule: Monetary opportunity fields cannot be written from workflows
limitation_rules.response: The PCC form is the sole writer of all dollar fields. Native Opportunity Value carries net revenue for reporting and conversion values.

limitation_rules.rule: Dropdown writes must exactly match an option value
limitation_rules.response: Enums store lowercase codes (sold/nosale/mut/mar, new/renewal). Workflow writes are branch-static literals. Nothing is merge-copied between fields with different option sets.

limitation_rules.rule: Contact fields keep the platform superpowers (form writes, field-change and date triggers)
limitation_rules.response: Member current-state (consent, membership_status, renewal_date, preferences) stays contact-level by design, not by accident.
A 30-to-60-second wait sits between any field write and a branch or trigger that reads it.

limitation_rules.rule: API: every workflow PUT rewrites the step file
limitation_rules.response: All programmatic saves send the full templates array with diff arrays and version; snapshots are taken before every write (proven playbook in the ghl-development skill).

exists = gross; native Opportunity Value = net collected

form_tweak_r1.summary: Minimal change to the existing PCC Sales Form. No structural rebuild, no retraining. Fixes incorrect capture only; workflow stamps keep doing the opportunity writes in R1.

changes.why: stamps and routers branch on stable codes; A&D collides with advertising shorthand

changes.why: two writers for one fact is a defect; renewal split feeds separate ad conversion actions

changes.why: per-deal provider is a v2 requirement; renewals may see a different provider
drives renewal_date math; item 2+ detail moves to SAC
financing waterfall reporting; monetary fields are form-only writers

form_tweak_r1.verification: After tweak: run one test disposition per outcome code and confirm the WF-05 stamps land the codes on the opportunity. R2 verifies direct opportunity-field writes from the form (opp binding), R3 flips the form to be the writer.

workflow_registry_notes.note: Lead Capture and Attribution: stamps frozen attribution + location on the opportunity at create; emits lead_created to SAC via webhook step
Booking Confirmation and Reminders: booking events come server-side from the booking app, not from this workflow; cancel exit built in
Clinic Outcome Router: gates on appt_status BEFORE reading sale_outcome; stamps outcome/PCC/provider/term/referrer + outcome_processed_at; emits appt_outcome to SAC
Post-Visit Won and Onboarding: sets contact.renewal_date and membership_status; emits opportunity_won (new|renewal) to SAC with value
Post-Visit A&D Nurture: branches on opportunity.nosale_reason codes (cost/fear/partner/timing/decision) per the locked taxonomy
Long-Term Nurture + renewal campaigns keyed off contact.renewal_date custom-date trigger
Call Disposition Handler: inbound calls become contacts with lead_source=phone; emits call_lead to SAC (closes the Google call-conversion blind spot)
REDEFINED: Ad-Platform Conversions no longer sends to Meta/Google directly. It is the SAC webhook emitter set; SAC owns all platform sends, dedupe, and retries

sac.name: SAC (Server-side Attribution & Conversions)
sac.stack: Supabase (anonymized event store; funnel_events spine shared with mwc-next / mwc-admin) + Vercel serverless workers
sac.collection: Thin first-party script on menswellnesscenters.com (WordPress) and book.menswellnesscenters.com: captures click IDs (gclid/wbraid/gbraid/fbclid/msclkid), UTMs, fbp/fbc, consent state, and writes them to hidden GHL fields + localStorage. No third-party pixels on regulated pages. Transmission is server-side only.
sac.identity: Spine = GHL contact_id / opportunity_id / appointment_id (opaque, non-PHI). Click IDs are the fallback join. No email/phone stored in clear; identifiers hashed (SHA-256) at ingest when consented, never stored raw.
sac.storage: Supabase tables: events (append-only, event_id unique), conversions_outbox (queued sends with status), reconciliation_daily. Hashing at rest, retention window (default 25 months to match ad-platform lookback + audit), minimum-necessary access roles, BAA tier verification is an R2 gate.
sac.junk_filter: Events are emitted only on real object creation server-side (contact created, appointment booked, opportunity won). Pixel phantoms (the 965 Consent-page ghosts) never reach the outbox.

event_contract.source: booking app / WordPress form (server) or WF-01 webhook
event_contract.notes: only after submitLead() returns a real contact

event_contract.sends: Meta Schedule (proxy $800), Google Ads primary booked_appointment
event_contract.notes: existing GTM contract names reused; /confirmed page load never fires it

event_contract.source: RingCentral / GHL inbound call via WF-12
event_contract.sends: Google call conversions reconciled to CRM contacts
event_contract.notes: lead_source=phone stamped; closes the call blind spot

event_contract.sends: Google offline conversion won_new (real value), Meta MembershipWon
separate conversion action, excluded from acquisition optimization

event_contract.notes: seam specced now, activated post Lobbie go-live

activation.google: Offline Conversion Import + Enhanced Conversions for Leads: gclid/wbraid + hashed email/phone (consent-gated), conversion actions: booked_appointment (primary), won_new (primary, real value), won_renewal (secondary), lead (secondary diagnostic). 90-day click lookback backfill at cutover.
activation.meta: Conversions API server events: Lead, Schedule, MembershipWon custom event; event_id dedupe against any remaining browser events; hashed identifiers only when consented; generic event_source_url (no condition/service params); test_event_code validation before live.
activation.values: Proxies until Won flows: $800 booking_complete, $230 lead. Real Opportunity Value at won_new/won_renewal.

hipaa_decision.question: What identity data may leave for Meta/Google, and on which events?
hipaa_decision.option_a: Consented identifiers: express marketing consent captured at the funnel form (pre-clinical); hashed email/phone sent on lead_created and booking_complete; Won events reuse the SAME pre-clinical identifiers plus click ID (no new clinical-context data).
hipaa_decision.option_b: Value-only: click ID + value + event time on everything post-booking; no user identifiers ever sent after a person becomes a member. Lower match quality on offline imports, near-zero identity risk.
hipaa_decision.recommendation: Hybrid A/B: Option A for pre-patient funnel events (lead, booking) where consent is captured at submission, Option B posture for Won events (click ID + value only). Document as the standing decision, revisit with counsel before enabling Enhanced Conversions on Won.
hipaa_decision.hard_rules: No condition/service parameters in any URL or payload. No symptom, treatment, or medication data in any event. Opaque GHL ids only. Consent state stored per contact and honored at the outbox, not at collection.

sac.measurement: Reconciliation dashboard (mwc-admin): platform-reported conversions vs CRM truth set (real contacts, booked, sold) daily; signal-drop alerting when outbox failures or daily deltas exceed thresholds; monthly June-style truth-set review built from opportunities, not tags.
sac.delivery: Outbox pattern: queued sends, retries with backoff, dead-letter + replay job. Token custody: Meta system-user and Google developer tokens in the secret manager with a rotation runbook (one Meta token was previously exposed in a workflow).

transition.detail: Pause/demote GADS-Qualify, GADS-Schedule page-load tags and premature mwc_lead; primary = event-based booking only

transition.gate: test contact per outcome code, diff-harness zero blockers

Old CAPI/Sheets workflows off, GTM thank-you tags off, parked contact fields retired

What remains is ALIGNMENT (enums to codes, duplicate consolidation), not creation.

alignment_window.summary: These changes alter live behavior and must land TOGETHER in one maintenance window with the PCC form option updates and the WF-05 condition updates (new submissions instantly carry new codes; old workflows branch on old prose). Additive work is already done; nothing here executes without an explicit window.
items: Recreate sale_outcome as SINGLE_OPTIONS with codes; rewire every workflow condition and the form
Flip option lists to codes: sale_type, pay_type, product_sold_1, nosale_reason (locked taxonomy), medical_intake_status
Consolidate PCC to one field, one canonical roster; migrate form + bonus workflow reads
Park deprecated opportunity fields in a zz Deprecated folder (nothing deleted)

target_release_findings.summary: Audit of the -Target Release drafts in prod (WF-01..16, built Jul 11) against Cody's three criticisms plus a completeness check. Verdict: triggers criticism is fully valid (15 of 16 have none), cadence criticism is valid for early-funnel speed (draft waits hours where the proven live system moves in minutes), and 'too long' applies to exactly two workflows - while six others have the opposite problem (skeletal, missing their mechanics).
target_release_findings.triggers: Only WF-01 has a trigger. WF-02..16 have zero - they can never fire. Fix is mechanical: trigger specs exist in the To-Be docs and the trigger write endpoint (POST /workflow/{loc}/trigger, active:false) is proven.

cadence_standard.principle: Adopt the PROVEN live cadence for early funnel; day-scale only after the first 48 hours. Quiet hours 8am-9pm contact time on every step; first SMS of each sequence carries STOP.
cadence_standard.speed_to_lead: First SMS within 3 minutes of lead creation (live 02. NON BOOKED NEWLEADS proves 3-min first touch). Draft WF-01 (2-3 min) is fine; keep.
cadence_standard.non_booked_recovery: Live proven burst: +3m, +1m, +5m, +15m in the first half hour, then 24h and 36h. Draft WF-02 waits 2 HOURS between early touches - too slow; retime to the live burst then 20h/1d/2d tail.
cadence_standard.booking_confirmation: Draft WF-03 has 5 SMS but only one 1-hour wait and no appointment-relative anchors. Reminders must anchor to appointment time (T-1d, T-2h) via appointment-based trigger/wait, like live 03b (immediate confirm ask, 15m/1-2h re-asks).
cadence_standard.no_show_recovery: Draft WF-08 (15m, 45m, 23h, 2d, 2d, 2d) is directionally right; live adds a long tail (7d, 7d, 30d, 180d) via Nurture: Missed - keep the tail in WF-09 handoff.
cadence_standard.nurture: Day-scale cadence in WF-07/09 (1-5 day gaps) is correct for post-visit sequences; no change.

length_and_context: TOO LONG (split): WF-07 A&D Nurture is 97 nodes / 48 waits; WF-09 Long-Term is 61 nodes / 30 waits. Split into a thin router + per-objection (cost/fear/partner/timing/decision) or per-phase child sequences via add-to-workflow. Editing a 97-node graph re-versions the whole file on every save - operationally risky.

TOO THIN (finish): WF-10 Feedback (1 node), WF-11 Compliance (2), WF-13 Conversions (2), WF-12 Call Disposition (3), WF-15 Referral (4), WF-16 Comms Edge (5) are skeletons missing their designed mechanics (survey branch, DND authority, SAC webhook emitters, call handling, IVR/missed-call edge).
